# PerfControls.Flag method

Resolve a launch flag the same way as the perf flags: `STELLAR_<NAME>=1` in the env, OR a line "`NAME`"/"`NAME=1`" in `game_mini/stellar_perf.flags`. Shared so other gates (e.g. [`StellarDiagnostics`](../StellarDiagnostics.md)) read the deploy-script mode file without Heroic env edits.

```csharp
public static bool Flag(string name)
```
